name: ShapeCatalog
summary: The ShapeCatalog class represents a group of controls to select Shapes using the Shape catalog.

constructors.name: ShapeCatalog
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ShapeCatalog class.

constructors.name: ShapeCatalog
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ShapeCatalog class and will select the Shape (if available) in the tree.

methods.name: OnValueChanged
methods.summary: Event handler for passing generic catalog data back to dialog

properties.name: ButtonText
properties.summary: Gets and sets the text of the button control.

properties.name: SelectedShape
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected Shape in the control.

events.name: SelectClicked
events.summary: The SelectClicked event is raised when the Select button is clicked.

events.name: SelectionDone
events.summary: The SelectionDone event is raised when the selection has been done.
